news_results.title: Rep. Stefanik ends her campaign for New York governor, won't seek reelection to House | PBS News
news_results.description: Stefanik, a Republican ally of President Donald Trump, said in a statement that she was confident of her chances in the primary against Bruce Blakeman, a Republican county official in New York City’s suburbs. But she said, “It is not an effective use of our time” to stay in the race.
